creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
gnome-libtool: link: ranlib .libs/libatk-1.0.a
gnome-libtool: link: ( cd ".libs" && rm -f "libatk-1.0.la" && ln -s "../libatk-1
.0.la" "libatk-1.0.la" )
/usr/local/bin/g-ir-scanner   --namespace=Atk --nsversion=1.0 --libtool="/bin/sh
/usr/ports/accessibility/atk/work/gnome-libtool"  --include=GObject-2.0   --lib
rary=libatk-1.0.la --pkg-export atk -I.. -DG_DISABLE_DEPRECATED -DATK_DISABLE_DE
PRECATED -DATK_COMPILATION -DATK_LOCALEDIR="\"/usr/local/share/locale\"" -D_REEN
TRANT -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include    atk.h a
tkaction.h atkcomponent.h atkdocument.h atkeditabletext.h atkgobjectaccessible.h
atkhyperlink.h atkhyperlinkimpl.h atkhypertext.h atknoopobject.h atknoopobjectf
actory.h atkobject.h atkobjectfactory.h atkplug.h atkimage.h atkregistry.h atkre
lation.h atkrelationtype.h atkrelationset.h atkselection.h atksocket.h atkstate.
h atkstateset.h atkstreamablecontent.h atktable.h atktext.h atkutil.h atkmisc.h
atkvalue.h atkaction.c atkcomponent.c atkdocument.c atkeditabletext.c atkgobject
accessible.c atkhyperlink.c atkhyperlinkimpl.c atkhypertext.c atkimage.c atknoop
object.c atknoopobjectfactory.c atkobject.c atkobjectfactory.c atkplug.c atkregi
stry.c atkrelation.c atkrelationset.c atkselection.c atksocket.c atkstate.c atks
tateset.c atkstreamablecontent.c atktable.c atktext.c atkutil.c atkmisc.c atkval
ue.c atk-enum-types.c atk-enum-types.h libatk-1.0.la Makefile --output Atk-1.0.g
